info.kOmudIDAtukramANkaH: ayaM DAtuH sidDAntakOmudyAM pfTak rUpeRa pAWitaH nAsti parantu tatra 5.27 fDu~ ityatra 'tfpa prIRana ityeke' iti pAWaBedarUpeRa nirdizwaH dfSyate

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'yAvantaH kAmAH samatItfpastAn' (aTarva॰12.3.36) yA tfptiH sEva santfptiH tena samSabdo DAtvarTAnuvAdI nArTopajanAya DAtupAWe'rTanirdeSo vyAmohakaH DAtureza prAcIne sAhitye sarvatrAkarmako na kevalaM dEvAdikaH sOvAdiko'pi ata eva prakfte samatItfpa ityatra prIRane RicprayogaH
'vitarpayanti ye puRyAstfzitAYSItalE rjalEH' (skandapu0 kA0 41260) vitarpayanti vigatatfzRAn suhitAnkurvanti
'A yat tfpanmaruto vAvaSAnAH' (f0 1173) Atfpan tfptAH suhitA aBUvan
'anukAmaM tarpayeTAmindrAvaruRA rAya A' (f0 1733) Danasya prakAmaM tarpayataM na ityAha anyatra AtarpaRaM maNgalAlepanaM Bavati
